content:
# Best AI Productivity Tools for Consultants in 2026

Consultants need to juggle multiple clients, projects, and deliverables. AI tools help you stay organized and deliver more value!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Notion AI: Client Knowledge Hub

Notion AI helps consultants manage client information, project docs, and knowledge bases.

### Notion AI for Consultants
- **Client workspaces**: Keep all client info organized
- **AI summaries**: Quick recaps of long documents
- **Project tracking**: Manage deliverables efficiently

**Try Notion AI**: {{AFFILIATE_NOTION}}

---

## [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]: Project Management

[[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] adds AI features to project management for consulting work.

### ClickUp AI for Consultants
- **AI task creation**: Turn client requests into tasks
- **Automated workflows**: Reduce manual administrative work
- **Client portals**: Keep clients updated automatically

**Try ClickUp AI**: {{AFFILIATE_CLICKUP}}

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Consulting Focus |
|------|----------|-------|-----------------|
| Notion AI | Knowledge management | $8/mo | Client docs |
| [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] | Project management | $7/mo | Deliverables |
| [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]] | Simple task tracking | $4/mo | Basic tasks |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Knowledge management**: Start with Notion AI
- **Project tracking**: Use [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]
- **Simple tasks**: Try [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]]

Ready to boost your consulting productivity? Try these AI tools today!
